reasoning: This is an HR induction portal. Users (often non-technical site workers or subcontractors) need to feel trust, clarity, and ease when handling sensitive data like medical history. A light theme with deep forest green accents provides an authoritative yet approachable feel, replacing harsh clinical tech colors with natural, grounded tones.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mobile-first, generous padding, vertical flow with sticky progress header.

progress_bar.description: Sticky at the top. 4px height indicator bar, filling from left to right with brand.primary color. Below the bar, show 'Section X of 3' text in small font to provide constant context.

gate_screen.description: Full screen layout. Background uses the abstract geometric image with a blur. Center card is white, rounded-2xl, shadow-lg, containing the Access Code and Email inputs. Large primary button to enter.

buttons.primary: bg-[#166534] text-white hover:bg-[#14532D] shadow-sm font-medium h-14 w-full text-lg (optimized for mobile touch)
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1C1917] border border-[#E7E5E4] hover:bg-[#FAFAF9] font-medium h-14 w-full text-lg
buttons.yes_no_pill: flex-1 h-14 border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer data-[state=active]:bg-[#166534] data-[state=active]:text-white data-[state=active]:border-[#166534] data-[state=inactive]:bg-white data-[state=inactive]:text-[#57534E]

inputs.text: h-14 border-[#E7E5E4] bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#166534]/20 focus:border-[#166534] text-base
inputs.file_upload: min-h-[140px] border-2 border-dashed border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-[#FAFAF9] hover:bg-[#F5F5F4] transition-colors p-6 cursor-pointer text-center
inputs.signature_canvas: h-48 border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-xl bg-white w-full cursor-crosshair touch-none shadow-inner

toast.description: Auto-save indicator should be a subtle toast or fixed badge at bottom right/center. Green check icon, 'Progress saved', transient without blocking UI.

gate_background.description: Abstract light geometric background for the access code login screen.

success_background.description: Clean, structured background for the final success/PDF download screen.

icons.usage: Use thick, readable icons (strokeWidth={2}). Needed: CheckCircle2 (success), UploadCloud (file upload), FileText (PDF), ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, Save (auto-save).

motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and inputs.
motion.page_load: Fade in sections using Framer Motion (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0) to avoid jarring transitions between the 3 steps.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-section-1-button', data-testid='yes-medical-q1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'mobile-first' means tap targets are large (min-h-14). Avoid small buttons or links.
Replace standard radio buttons with large, tappable 'Pills' (flex-1 containers) for Yes/No questions (Medical & HAVS).
For the file uploader, implement validation logic (max 10MB, jpg/png/pdf) and show clear visual feedback on drop or select.
The signature section needs an actual drawing canvas (e.g., using react-signature-canvas) plus a standard text input for the typed legal name.
Use a sticky top bar for the Progress Indicator so the user always knows their context. Use a fixed div with top-0 and z-50.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter or Roboto. Use the specified fonts (Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text).
Ensure all input labels are extremely clear and accessible, placed above the inputs.
Implement the autosave feature natively or mock it effectively with a visual toast notification on blur/change.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and form controls for automated testing.
